docket_entries.description: SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARJANI, MARTIN AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, PATRICE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY HARJANI, MARTIN AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, PATRICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARJANI, MARTIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACKSON, PATRICE $3,243.03 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,293.03, THE JUDGMENT DOES NOT INCLUDE RECOVERY FOR LOSS OF USE OF THE AUTOMOBILE. RECOVERY FOR THE RENTAL VEHICLE IS THE RIGHT OF THE REGISTERED OWNER OF THE DAMAGED VEHICLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
